mapper.select: SELECT CAST(sku.id AS CHAR) AS id, spu.id AS spuId, sku.id AS skuId, spu.brand_id AS brandId, spu.category_id AS categoryId, brand.brand_name AS brandName, category.category_name AS categoryName, spu.spu_name AS spuName, sku.sku_name AS skuName, sku.spec_text AS specText, spu.main_image_id AS mainImageId, spu.image_ids AS imageIds, spu.keywords AS keywords, spu.detail_content AS detailContent, spu.description AS description, sku.base_price AS basePrice, sku.stock_qty AS stockQty, sku.safety_stock AS safetyStock, DATE_FORMAT(sku.updated_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updatedAt FROM product_spu spu JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.spu_id = spu.id AND sku.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_brand brand ON brand.id = spu.brand_id AND brand.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_category category ON category.id = spu.category_id AND category.deleted = 0 WHERE spu.deleted = 0 AND spu.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY sku.updated_time DESC, sku.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM product_spu spu JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.spu_id = spu.id AND sku.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_brand brand ON brand.id = spu.brand_id AND brand.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_category category ON category.id = spu.category_id AND category.deleted = 0 WHERE spu.deleted = 0 AND spu.supplier_id = #{supplierId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_spu ( supplier_id, brand_id, category_id, spu_code, spu_name, unit_name, main_image_id, image_ids, keywords, detail_content, description, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{supplierId}, #{brandId}, #{categoryId}, #{spuCode}, #{spuName}, '件', #{mainImageId}, #{imageIds}, #{keywords}, #{detailContent}, #{description}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorId}, 0 )

INSERT INTO product_sku ( spu_id, sku_code, sku_name, spec_text, base_price, stock_qty, safety_stock, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{spuId}, #{skuCode}, #{skuName}, #{specText}, #{basePrice}, #{stockQty}, #{safetyStock}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorId}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(sku.id AS CHAR) AS id, spu.id AS spuId, sku.id AS skuId, spu.brand_id AS brandId, spu.category_id AS categoryId, brand.brand_name AS brandName, category.category_name AS categoryName, spu.spu_name AS spuName, sku.sku_name AS skuName, sku.spec_text AS specText, spu.main_image_id AS mainImageId, spu.image_ids AS imageIds, sku.base_price AS basePrice, sku.stock_qty AS stockQty, sku.safety_stock AS safetyStock, spu.description AS description, DATE_FORMAT(sku.updated_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updatedAt FROM product_spu spu JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.spu_id = spu.id AND sku.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_brand brand ON brand.id = spu.brand_id AND brand.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_category category ON category.id = spu.category_id AND category.deleted = 0 WHERE spu.deleted = 0 AND spu.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND sku.id = #{skuId} LIMIT 1
